demos.text: In general, we advise you to try and keep the topology (the layout) of your DAG tasks relatively stable; dynamic DAGs are usually better used for dynamically loading configuration options or changing operator options.

demos.text: While simpler DAGs are usually only in a single Python file, it is not uncommon that more complex DAGs might be spread across multiple files and have dependencies that should be shipped with them ("vendored").
